use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ER-POSITIVE, HER2-NEGATIVE ADVANCED BREAST CANCER IN COMBINATION WITH LETROZOLE AS INITIAL ENDOCRINE-BASED THERAPY FOR METASTATIC DISEASE IN POSTMENOPAUSAL WOMEN
